soak_removed_note: Operator 2026-07-06 (current message): 'remove all the soak.' The soak concept is removed entirely — no soak-wait discipline, no learning-collection freeze, no soak timer. The closed loop runs continuously and governs gates/sizing/authority from live settled evidence. .grok/rules/soak-learning-lock.md and scripts/pulse-babysit/set-soak.ps1 were deleted.
locks_lifted_note: Operator 2026-07-01 (current message): 'deep scan bot and remove all locks you can find, make sure loop engineering is learning and adjusting.' The soak-learning lock, TradingView observe-only lock, and the authority freeze are LIFTED. The closed loop now governs gates/sizing/authority from live settled evidence: research auto-apply, dep-arb experiment auto-apply, calibration + bucket_bleeding auto-halt, selectivity gate, maker-checker verifier, learning blend, edge model, Bregman + Grok trade authority. Agents/loop may tune freely.

retained_invariants_never_lifted.paper_only: PAPER ONLY forever. live_trading_enabled must stay false; no env may route real money. Enabling live/real-money requires an explicit operator instruction in the current message (CLAUDE.md non-negotiable #3/#4).
retained_invariants_never_lifted.honest_accounting: No fake/inflated performance (CLAUDE.md non-negotiable #1): dep-arb stays outcome-settled (real losses booked), within-window arb epsilon stays >= fees floor 0.003 (no booking risk-free edge that non-atomic fills would erase), no no-loss heuristic.
retained_invariants_never_lifted.reconciliation: Ledger/decision-lifecycle reconciliation must stay true; fix reconciliation bugs, never fake them.

frozen_code_paths_note: ADVISORY ONLY (not an enforced lock): take care not to break open-snapshot persistence, the executor paper ledger, or reconciliation when editing these — correctness, not a behavior freeze.
